description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish to PyPI that runs on push. It should have three jobs: build, test, and publish. The build job on ubuntu-latest checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, upgrades build, builds the package, and uploads distributions as an artifact. The test job depends on build, downloads the artifact, and publishes to a test PyPI repository. The publish job depends on test, runs only on tag pushes, downloads the artifact, and publishes to PyPI.
